# Compute Instance Agent

Observe existing OCI Compute Instance Agent plugins from Kubernetes with a bind-existing, controller-backed read-only contract.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Package | `computeinstanceagent` |
| Support Status | Preview |
| Latest Released Version | `Not yet released` |
| Install Namespace | `oci-service-operator-computeinstanceagent-system` |
| Controller Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-computeinstanceagent:<version>` |
| Bundle Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-computeinstanceagent-bundle:<version>` |
| Setup Guide | [Open guide](../../../installation.md) |

## Notes

- Current package scope is intentionally limited to InstanceAgentPlugin and publishes only a bind-existing observe-only contract.
- The reviewed runtime uses GetInstanceAgentPlugin for read projection, keeps ListInstanceAgentPlugins in a confirmation-only role, and does not expose OCI create, update, or delete behavior or plugin enable-disable mutation.
- No checked-in release manifest currently lists this package; the resource scope below reflects the current repository package metadata.
- This package is currently hidden from the Supported Resources landing page until a checked-in release manifest promotes it to the customer-visible surface.
